title: PEER SUPPORT - 211info
text: COLUMBIA COUNTY VIRTUAL SERVICES PEER SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help, advice, guidance, and support from peer support specialists who have personal experience in youth-serving systems, including mental health, foster care, and juvenile justice. Services are community-based and can take place at individuals' homes or other location in the community, depending on the needs and preferences of the individual. Confidential Address Eligibility: Ages 14-21 Hours: Varies by service Email (971) 978-9797 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 978-9797 Brooke Sanders [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Age Peer Networking If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
